disruptions.title: South Western Railway — Signal Failure
disruptions.description: Signal failure at Woking causing significant delays across the Guildford line. Trains running 25–40 minutes late. Service expected to normalise by 09:30.
disruptions.footfall_note: Commuter-driven morning rush will be suppressed until 09:30. Expect delayed peak footfall from 09:30–11:00 as disruption resolves.

disruptions.title: Arriva Bus — Route 36 Diversion
disruptions.description: Route 36 (Guildford–Godalming) diverted via Onslow Village due to burst water main on Epsom Road. Journey times increased by 10–15 minutes.
disruptions.footfall_note: Minor impact — most affected commuters will use alternative routes or drive.

disruptions.title: A25 Roadworks — Shalford Junction
disruptions.description: Overnight roadworks running through today until 08:00. Lane closures lifted — traffic returning to normal.
disruptions.footfall_note: Roadworks completed — no further impact expected.

local_events.name: Guildford Christmas Market
local_events.opportunity_note: Christmas market directly outside store — expect 30–40% higher footfall 10:00–20:00. Maximise takeaway cup stock and ensure seasonal drinks are front-of-house.

local_events.name: University of Surrey Winter Exams
local_events.opportunity_note: Exam season drives afternoon study café visits. Students represent ~18% of your afternoon customer base. Activate NUS 10% discount visibility.

morning_rush.note: Train disruption suppresses commuter rush until 09:30

late_morning.note: Disruption resolves — pent-up demand catches up

afternoon.note: Christmas market peak + student exam-break visits

evening.note: Christmas market runs until 20:00 — strong takeaway demand

disruptions.title: South Western Railway — Signal Failure Impact
disruptions.description: Signal failure at Woking. Guildford Station seeing large queues of stranded commuters. Trains running again from 09:30.
disruptions.footfall_note: Station location BENEFITS from disruption — stranded commuters are seeking hot drinks and food while waiting. Expect significantly above-normal footfall 06:00–09:30.

disruptions.title: Oracle Car Park — Level 3 Closed
disruptions.description: Level 3 of Oracle multi-storey car park closed for maintenance. Shoppers redirected to Level 1, 2, and 4. Increased car park queuing expected.
disruptions.footfall_note: Parking frustration may deter some car-born shoppers. Expect 5–10% reduction in midday footfall.

local_events.name: Reading FC Home Match
local_events.opportunity_note: Pre-match crowd generates strong 17:00–19:30 footfall. Stock up on takeaway cups and quick-serve items. Fans appreciate a warm drink and snack before the game.

late_morning.note: Parking continues to affect car-borne shoppers

local_events.name: Brighton & Hove Food Festival
local_events.opportunity_note: Major food event this weekend — position the store as the pre-festival coffee stop. Consider a branded take-on-the-go promotion. Social media opportunity: tag the festival.

local_events.name: New Pret a Manger Opening
local_events.opportunity_note: Competitor opening 180m away. Activate loyalty double-points promotion this week to pre-empt customer trial visits to Pret. Brief the team on Costa's points of difference — craft, customisation, Costa Club.

late_morning.note: Good weather drives town centre footfall
